title: hieracium burnatii subsp. tomentellum
intro: Hieracium burnatii subsp. tomentellum is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly known as a type of Hawkweed. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Hieracium burnatii subsp. tomentellum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical applications for therapeutic purposes.
